assessments.threshold: 2,200-9,000 mm minimum bar length for in-line IH
assessments.rationale: Short firearms components (slide rail inserts, locking pieces) are below 2,200 mm minimum IH length. Induction hardening must be performed externally or by alternative method for short parts.
assessments.mitigation: External IH service or batch furnace hardening for sub-2200 mm parts

assessments.rationale: Steel profiles for firearms are subject to EU Dual-Use Regulation 2021/821 and potentially US ITAR. ZOLLERN must maintain export compliance documentation per shipment.
assessments.mitigation: BAFA-authorized export compliance program; per-shipment documentation package

assessments.rationale: Prototype quantities for new firearms platforms may fall below 100 kg. Blocks precision/custom gunsmith segment.
assessments.mitigation: NRE die model with amortized piece price; nearest-existing-die prototype service

assessments.rationale: New receiver and slide rail geometries require custom dies. Lead time is the primary barrier to new program adoption.
assessments.mitigation: Pre-qualified common receiver/slide geometries in die library; express tooling program

assessments.rationale: Firearms structural components (receivers, slides, barrels) are steel. Polymer frames are not ZOLLERN's target BOM position. Steel-only matches requirement.
